since_last: 55% of 86 AI names green; AI Applications & Data Software leads +0.90%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a mixed, rotational tape, 55% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.71% · BTC -3.63% · Gold -2.60% · Nasdaq100 +0.43%. 55% of 86 AI names are green — a mixed, rotational tape. AI Applications & Data Software is doing the heavy lifting at +0.90%.

cards.headline: AI Applications & Data Software leads, Data Center, Power & Energy lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Applications & Data Software at +0.90%; weakest is Data Center, Power & Energy at -0.76%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: UPST is the standout at +6.60%
cards.body: Leaders: UPST +6.60%, ZBRA +4.12%, WDAY +3.59%, INTU +3.39%, PUBM +3.39%. Laggards: SMR -4.51%, OKLO -4.08%, OKLO -4.08%, ORCL -3.63%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +2.20% at $159.54
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +2.20% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
